name: Heritage Deluxe Room
description: Elegant French-colonial inspired room with wooden shutters, vintage tiles, and views of the Old Quarter streets below.

name: Rooftop Suite
description: Spacious suite on the top floor with a private terrace, panoramic Old Quarter rooftops, and complimentary afternoon tea.

name: Beachfront Villa
description: Private villa steps from the sand, with an infinity plunge pool, outdoor shower, and direct sunset views over the ocean.

name: Garden Pool Villa
description: Tucked within a tropical garden, featuring a secluded plunge pool, hammock terrace, and open-air bathroom.

name: Riverside Charm Room
description: Lantern-lit ambiance with wooden furnishings, silk accents, and a balcony overlooking the Thu Bon River.

name: Pine View Cabin
description: Cozy highland cabin with a stone fireplace, floor-to-ceiling windows framing pine forests, and a deep soaking tub.

name: Skyline Executive Suite
description: Floor-to-ceiling glass panels frame the Saigon skyline — modern minimalist design with a work desk and lounge area.

name: Presidential Penthouse
description: The crown jewel — a two-level penthouse with private rooftop terrace, dining room, and 360-degree city panorama.

name: Ocean Superior Room
description: Bright, airy room with direct ocean views from a private balcony — wake up to the sound of waves on My Khe Beach.

name: Terrace Cloud Room
description: Wake above the clouds — private terrace overlooking cascading rice terraces, with ethnic-inspired textiles and handcrafted furniture.
